Principal Infrastructure Engineer

Engineering · Remote (Americas) · Full-Time

The Role

As a Principal Infrastructure Engineer at ExampleCo, you will be the senior-most individual contributor on our Infrastructure team. You will set the multi-year technical direction for our compute, network, and storage substrate, and partner with engineering leaders across the company to align our platform investments with business goals. This is a highly visible role that combines deep technical work with organizational influence.

Impact

  • Define the architecture roadmap for ExampleCo's production compute environment spanning thousands of services and tens of thousands of nodes.
  • Lead the design of cross-cutting infrastructure initiatives — multi-region active-active, zero-trust networking, compute cost optimization — that move the company's top-line reliability and efficiency metrics.
  • Serve as the principal reviewer for infrastructure design documents; raise the technical bar through written feedback and RFC shepherding.
  • Mentor staff and senior engineers on technical depth, systems thinking, and written communication.
  • Represent ExampleCo externally through conference talks, open-source contributions, and technical blog posts.

You might be a fit if you have

  • 10+ years of software engineering experience, with at least 5 years at staff or principal level building production infrastructure.
  • Demonstrated ownership of major multi-quarter initiatives in cloud infrastructure, networking, or distributed systems at a large-scale production environment.
  • Fluency with the modern cloud stack (Kubernetes, service mesh, eBPF) and one or more systems-level languages (Go, Rust, C++).
  • A track record of written artifacts — design docs, RFCs, postmortems — that align large groups around a technical direction.
  • Strong engineering judgment: you know when to invest in platforms vs. ship a surgical fix, and you make tradeoffs visible.

Compensation

Base salary range: $280,000 – $360,000 plus equity. ExampleCo offers a comprehensive benefits package including unlimited PTO, $5,000 annual learning budget, and co-working stipend.

About us

ExampleCo is a growth-stage company building infrastructure software used by Fortune 500 enterprises. We are backed by leading venture investors and operate as a fully distributed team.
